examples: But he was sick of mummery, so instead he grimaced, signed, and handed the scroll back to Brown Ben.
84Across the page the symbols moved in grave morrice, in the mummery of their letters, wearing quaint caps of squares and cubes.
A show, as you have said. Let them have their mummery. When they are gone, we will make a fruit market of what they leave behind.
No one has said it better before or since than did Justice Lord Mummery.
